comment.text: This translation key displays a toggle button label, enabling or disabling AI functionality for a specific organization. It's used within a service toggle section in the Portal Settings, allowing users to control AI services for their organization (represented by `organizationName`). Translators should ensure the text accurately conveys the action of enabling AI for the organization.

usage.context:
<div className={styles.toggleSection}>
 <ServiceToggleSection
 isEnabled={isAiToolsServiceOn}
 onToggle={onToggleChange}
 title={t("EnableOrganizationAI", { organizationName: logoText })}
 description={t("EnableAIDescription")}
 testId="service-ai-toggle-button"
 isDisabled={isDisabled}
 />
